summary: Applied ADR 0066 live on current main by validating host-side mutation audit sinks on proxmox_florin and docker-runtime-lv3, seeding and exercising the Windmill mutation-audit helper, shipping both the structured host file and OpenBao native audit file through the ADR 0052 Alloy-to-Loki path, and repairing current-main execution-gate regressions that blocked the verified monitoring and Windmill converges.

verification.observed: `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `python3 scripts/mutation_audit.py --validate-schema` completed successfully on the integrated current-main branch.

`make converge-monitoring` completed successfully after wiring the ADR 0079 service playbooks to pass the mutation-audit and OpenBao file scrape definitions and after fixing the shared preflight selector expansion plus the generic Grafana readiness probe.

`make converge-windmill` completed successfully after fixing the generic Windmill readiness probe and making `linux_guest_firewall` package installation cache-neutral so unrelated stale observability repositories do not block firewall convergence.

Ad-hoc Ansible checks on `proxmox_florin` and `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed `/var/log/platform/mutation-audit.jsonl` exists, `/etc/alloy/config.alloy` references the expected mutation-audit paths, and `systemctl is-active alloy` returned `active`.

Posting a live verification payload to `http://100.118.189.95:8005/api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fmutation_audit_emit` returned a success event and appended correlation id `windmill:emit.mutation_audit_event:20260323T084527Z` to `docker-runtime-lv3:/var/log/platform/mutation-audit.jsonl`.
The `docker-runtime-lv3` Alloy configuration references `/opt/openbao/logs/audit.log` in the same mutation-audit scrape path used for the structured JSONL sink.

notes: The controller-side emitter still defaults to `.local/state/mutation-audit/mutation-audit.jsonl`; this receipt covers the live host-side sinks and Loki shipping path.

Current-main integration also required execution-layer repairs in `ansible.cfg`, `playbooks/tasks/preflight.yml`, and `config/health-probe-catalog.json` so the shared ADR 0079 verification path no longer blocks valid production converges.
